v1_pages_off_limits._note: v1 page IDs are not to be modified or deleted. v2 must use new page IDs only.

notes: All v2 pages are created as DRAFT — they do not appear in nav or sitemap.
Element ids are v2-prefixed to avoid Elementor cross-page collisions in the kit's stored data.
Palette swap from bone (#F3EEE5) to white (#FFFFFF) is the only token-level change vs v1 sections.
When approved for promotion, options: (a) publish drafts and 301 old → new, or (b) copy v2 elementor_data onto v1 page IDs.
